title: (No AI) China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
author: Terrence O’Brien
content:
![A grenade overlayed with ACSII art.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/03/STKS515_CYBER_WARFARE2_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

China's Zhipu AI ([Z.ai](http://z.ai)) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it [matches Mythos](https://www.wsj.com/tech/ai/chinese-ai-anthropic-mythos-cybersecurity-574b02c2?st=FRKgap&reflink=desktopwebshare_permalink) in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from [Anthropic](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/957845/openai-gpt-5-6-trump-administration-ai-preview) and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of the US.

This level of advancement is particularly concerning to the US government, which has worked to restrict China's access to powerful models like Anthropic's [Mythos](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/958458/anthropic-mythos-5-is-back-trump-negotiations) and Fable, as well as the hardware necessary to train and run them. The Trump administration views Mythos and other advan …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/958804/chinas-z-ai-glm-52-mythos-cybersecurity)
contentSnippet:
China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of the US.
This level of advancement is particularly concerning to the US government, which has worked to restrict China's access to powerful models like Anthropic's Mythos and Fable, as well as the hardware necessary to train and run them. The Trump administration views Mythos and other advan …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of […]

title: (No AI) Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
author: Terrence O’Brien
content:
![Keyboard with a robotic arm playing it](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/01/STK467_AI_MUSIC_CVirginia_C.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. [Spark](https://suno.com/blog/introducing-spark) is their new [incubator program](https://variety.com/2026/music/news/suno-spark-incubator-program-for-independent-artists-1236790684/) for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support.

To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or producer releasing music under their own name. They also need to agree to some [terms and conditions](https://suno.com/spark-terms?__clerk_handshake=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..FCQx-miaaxEqMHFJBOdAfqtJXi60nxvBFNv8rQ68stZ6g0aZ3eBDkz3ol2SvLM1d7a_1ufOjBGoCJelh41cphsJvUP7oOFCZbrchoFceUTVAsUTTwX764Ye8mZBJFO21_WHFc0lKfQlIO5E7r17zKjms2FMexisl3QDBPyUXTabagOy82CxJRGrMBqANs6RJfS5O3rIhYgKR2BGKSKxzacpw-D7_yaXTIHRYv5N5fZhzL9upYTnbD7epKxA5pVGiXSXCLT4hkI3_zz7LG2DxvFbc53uz2OI1vnFPYhDR6YE2N70QwJitsBSoXN_zdu-ITSVJCp3mIFINTxcW4TPLcA) that have raised some eyebrows over on the Suno [subreddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/SunoAI/comments/1uh5a8z/suno_spark_program_fine_print_what_you_need_to/?%24deep_link=true&correlation_id=1193787e-a550-4419-b74e-351f1ea9ea12&post_fullname=t3_1uh5a8z&post_index=2&ref=email_digest&ref_campaign=email_digest&ref_source=email&target_user=TerrenceOBrien&utm_content=post_body&%243p=e_as&_branch_match_id=1489710331186984120&utm_medium=Email%20Amazon%20SES&_branch_referrer=H4sIAAAAAAAAA22QT0%2FDMAzFP01360abljGkCQ0QEicOcLe8xm2jNX%2FkJCrjwGfHZcAJKZFe3s%2FPtjKmFOLtZsOktUlrDGE9GXfaqHBX1I0KewKMK5GezWAcTpB52o9LqlCHon6SM8%2Fz%2BiffeSsGy33Nzh%2BeRYhlyaUosspjizcfoqJQiAH5BIH9wGihN47kYVyCecQEZ5%2FBEWlIfhmjZFJbN5oowLJhoR4TZyrq684z04TJeAdGi19VO7W92VKJbXtVNk21K4%2FbhkrVVn1FuCOsaskFHxP0eZocWlraKfhb8AKN0%2FQuZKlm6kWRRTOBNgPFdDGhQxvQDO5%2FGn3mjn6ZmAl5oAQ5Eov7RrK76%2Bjlng05wTlZ6LxL8mOCv7c4en1efUozqTVugCP7WdL7h5G9pS%2FLGsXpwQEAAA%3D%3D). For one, you need to agree to make your songs available on Suno for remixing. That's not necessarily super concerning, but the broad license it grants Suno to your works …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/958801/suno-launches-spark-incubator-program-to-feed-independent-artists-to-its-ai-machine)
contentSnippet:
Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. Spark is their new incubator program for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support.
To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or producer releasing music under their own name. They also need to agree to some terms and conditions that have raised some eyebrows over on the Suno subreddit. For one, you need to agree to make your songs available on Suno for remixing. That's not necessarily super concerning, but the broad license it grants Suno to your works …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. Spark is their new incubator program for independent artists that provides grants, mentorship, and marketing support. To apply, artists need to be an unsigned singer, songwriter, or […]

title: (No AI) Trump Administration Allows Anthropic to Release  Mythos to Select US Organizations
